compiled_state.title: ticket deps <epic-id> returns empty deps for epics with parent-linked children
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: ticket deps d775-4a36 returns {deps:[], blockers:[], ready_to_work:true} even though 6 stories exist with parent_id=d775-4a36. Sprint skill Phase 1 uses ticket deps to count children and routes to preplanning when it sees 0 — this caused /dso:sprint to re-run complexity evaluation and nearly re-run /dso:preplanning on an already-decomposed epic. The ticket deps command appears to only return dependency links (depends_on), not parent-child relationships. Sprint skill should use a different method to detect children, or ticket deps should include parent-child relationships for epics.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
